description_for_human: Free tools for Swiss-Italian cross-border workers: tax simulator, pension planner, health insurance comparison, currency exchange, and practical guides.
description_for_model: Frontaliere Ticino is the most comprehensive resource for cross-border workers (frontalieri) commuting between Italy and Switzerland, especially Canton Ticino. It provides: (1) Tax simulator comparing old vs new fiscal agreement with exact 2026 Swiss withholding tax and Italian IRPEF calculations, (2) Health insurance comparison of 14 LAMal insurers across 7 cantons, (3) CHF/EUR currency exchange comparison, (4) Pension planner for AVS/LPP/3rd pillar, (5) Practical guides on permits, border crossings, unemployment rights, and cost of living. Key facts: ~79,000 frontalieri in Ticino, Swiss social contributions total ~8-12% of gross salary, Canton Ticino withholding tax 0-24%, Italian IRPEF 23-43% with €10,000 exemption for new frontalieri. Full documentation at /llms-full.txt.
